member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.VoiceExtraction.VoiceExtractionWorker
member.summary: Pure-compute worker that extracts a Voice Skill from an agent's emails and documents. Calls IAnthropicClient only — NO storage, NO DataServices.
Pure-compute worker that extracts a Voice Skill from an agent's emails and documents. Calls IAnthropicClient only — NO storage, NO DataServices.
